argument.script: (async () => { const id = '{{ id }}'; const res = await fetch('https://www.pixiv.net/ajax/illust/' + id, { credentials: 'include' }); if (!res.ok) { if (res.status === 401 || res.status === 403) throw new Error('Authentication required — please log in to Pixiv in Chrome'); if (res.status === 404) throw new Error('Illustration not found: ' + id); throw new Error('Pixiv request failed (HTTP ' + res.status + ')'); } const data = await res.json(); const b = data?.body; if (!b) throw new Error('Illustration not found'); return [{ illust_id: b.illustId, title: b.illustTitle, author: b.userName, type: b.illustType === 0 ? 'illust' : b.illustType === 1 ? 'manga' : b.illustType === 2 ? 'ugoira' : String(b.illustType), pages: b.pageCount, bookmarks: b.bookmarkCount, likes: b.likeCount, views: b.viewCount, tags: (b.tags?.tags || []).map(t => t.tag).join(', '), created: b.createDate?.split('T')[0] || '', url: 'https://www.pixiv.net/artworks/' + b.illustId }]; })()
